primary_source_explanation: Ahuja Foundation IRS 990-PF filings (EIN 341685088). The bundled snapshot was extracted from the IRS e-file XML corpus (lake.irs_990_returns + lake.irs_990_officers + lake.irs_990_pf_noncash_donations + ro_khanna.ahuja_foundation_holdings — XML, not PDF, is the canonical IRS publication for e-filed Form 990-PF). Mirror PDFs are provided as a courtesy for human review.

primary_source_endpoints_xml_canonical.pdf_mirror_status: NOT_AVAILABLE_FROM_PUBLISHER (ProPublica filings_with_data carries no pdf_url for TY2024 yet; IRS apps.irs.gov has not rendered PDF as of 2026-05-04)
NOT_AVAILABLE_FROM_PUBLISHER (ProPublica filings_with_data carries no pdf_url for TY2023 yet)
NOT_AVAILABLE_FROM_PUBLISHER (ProPublica filings_with_data carries no pdf_url for TY2020)

fetch_method_pdf_irs_direct: PDFs are fetchable anonymously from apps.irs.gov direct (no Cloudflare, no JS challenge): GET https://apps.irs.gov/pub/epostcard/cor/<filename> with any standard User-Agent. The 6 mirrored PDFs above were fetched this way.
fetch_method_xml_propublica_cloudflare_n: ProPublica's download-xml endpoint is Cloudflare-protected (returns 403 to urllib + cloudscraper + headless browser API calls). To fetch XML directly from ProPublica, use a real browser session that completes the Cloudflare JS challenge. Alternative paths: (a) IRS Tax-Exempt Organization Search at apps.irs.gov/app/eos (browser-rendered JS); (b) the bundled snapshot's lake-derived projection (lake.irs_990_returns + siblings) for the e-file extraction.

post_fetch_transformations.note: 990-PF XMLs ETL'd into lake.irs_990_returns + lake.irs_990_officers + lake.irs_990_pf_noncash_donations. Snapshot is the WHERE ein='341685088' projection.

tier_d_spot_check_protocol.description: Reviewers can spot-check by downloading any AHUJA_990PF_<year>.pdf release-mirror asset and verifying its SHA256 matches release_mirror_sha256 above. The PDF can also be cross-verified against IRS direct: GET https://apps.irs.gov/pub/epostcard/cor/<pdf_filename>.

limitations.pdf_mirror_completeness: 6 of 8 in-scope tax years (TY2018, TY2019, TY2021 + amendment, TY2022, plus TY2016 historical reference). TY2017, TY2020, TY2023, TY2024 are XML-only because the IRS / ProPublica did not render PDFs for those years (TY2017 had only e-file XML; TY2020/2023/2024 PDFs are still pending publisher rendering as of fetch date). The body claims sourced from those 4 years are XML-anchored, which is the canonical IRS publication for e-filed Form 990-PF.
limitations.pre_2016_filings: Earlier filings (2011-2015) used a different filename pattern that apps.irs.gov no longer hosts; ProPublica retains them but behind Cloudflare. These predate the snapshot's in-scope window so are not mirrored.
limitations.cloudflare_xml_path: The XML primary path (ProPublica download-xml) requires Cloudflare bypass. Reviewers who want raw XML can browse to https://projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/organizations/341685088 in a real browser and click XML links.
